notes: 1-brick smoke capture. This does not replace the 45-minute Section 13.7 classroom rehearsal. No capture errors. Real EV3 confirmation was provided.

results.evidence: `scratchai_unified_stack=true` plus local stack health logs from the rehearsal computer.
results.label: ScratchAI unified stack
results.requirement: ScratchAI editor, EV3 extension-library entry, WeisileLink, EV3 firmware, and AI Quest middleware run from the EV3SC-owned source tree.

results.detail: Requires `ev3_endpoint_connected=true` from a real EV3 brick.
results.evidence: `ev3_endpoint_connected=true` with EV3 IP/host evidence and WeisileLink connection logs.
results.label: Real EV3 endpoint connected
results.requirement: At least one real ev3dev EV3 brick connects through the unified ScratchAI stack.

results.evidence: `weisilelink_real_transport=true` with the transport mode and bridge status output.
results.label: WeisileLink real transport
results.requirement: WeisileLink uses a real WiFi or Bluetooth EV3 transport, not the local simulated preview transport.

results.detail: Requires motor command, emergency stop, and no in-class code changes.
results.label: Motor command and safety
results.requirement: Scratch EV3 blocks drive motors at classroom-safe values and the emergency stop path stops motors and sound.

results.label: Sensor stream freshness
results.requirement: The 45-minute student workflow streams sensor data close to the 50Hz target without excessive drops or memory growth.

results.detail: Requires AI Quest collection plus training/export evidence.
results.label: AI Quest collection, training, and export
results.requirement: The 45-minute student workflow collects labeled EV3 data, uploads to Trainer, trains or selects a model, and exports model rules.

results.detail: Observed 1 transports and 1 real EV3 devices; max reconnect 0.0s.
results.evidence: `transport_instance_count`, `device_count`, disconnect, reconnect, recovery-step, and no-code-change evidence.
results.label: 30-device classroom rehearsal
results.requirement: Start 1 WeisileLink instances or simulated EV3 transports on the classroom LAN, connect at least 1 real EV3 bricks if hardware is available, record disconnects, reconnect time, teacher recovery steps, and confirm the pilot required no code changes during class.
